cases.prompt: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or its immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number AS parcel_number,
       ps.situs_address,
       ps.situs_city_state_zip,
       ps.owner_name,
       ps.acres,
       ps.primary_building_style,
       ps.primary_building_improvement_value,
       ps.primary_actual_year_built,
       ps.primary_effective_year_built
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search_with_sales_improvements.parquet') ps
WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
  AND ps.acres BETWEEN 1 AND 3
  AND ps.primary_building_style LIKE '%MSL%'
  AND ps.primary_building_style IS NOT NULL
  AND ps.primary_building_style <> ''
cases.title: Sedro-Woolley Area Parcels with Low Quality Existing Residential Dwellings and 1-3 Acres
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or immediate unincorporated vicinity, with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.

cases.prompt: lots in sedro-woolley or marblemount that are over 1 acre with utilities and no improvements.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number AS parcel_number, ps.situs_address, ps.situs_city_state_zip, ps.acres, a."Utilities" AS utilities
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/assessor.parquet') a ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(a."Parcel Number")
WHERE (LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'marblemount' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%marblemount%')
  AND ps.acres > 1
  AND TRIM(COALESCE(a."Utilities", '')) <> ''
  AND COALESCE(ps.improvement_building_count, 0) = 0
cases.title: Lots in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount Over 1 Acre with Utilities and No Improvements
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount, larger than 1 acre, having utilities, and with no improvements recorded.

cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number AS parcel_number, ps.situs_address, ps.situs_city_state_zip, ps.owner_name, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.city_name
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
  AND ps.acres > 0
  AND ps.has_geometry = TRUE
  AND ps.land_use IS NOT NULL
  AND regexp_extract(ps.land_use, '^\((\d+)\)', 1) IN ('910', '911', '940', '941', '190')
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%MH LEASED PROPERTY%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%CONDOMINIUM%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%PUBLIC%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%CIVIC%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%OPEN SPACE%'
  AND (ps.improvement_building_count IS NULL OR ps.improvement_building_count = 0)
cases.title: Recreation Lots in Sedro-Woolley
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels in Sedro-Woolley city area with land use indicating recreational or undeveloped land, excluding mobile home leased properties, condominiums, public/civic/open-space parcels, zero-acre or no-geometry parcels, and parcels with residential dwelling evidence.
